title: Philotria minor
intro: Philotria minor, also known as the Minor Philotria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with potential health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Philotria minor include annonaceous acetogenins, which have been shown to exhibit cytotoxic and antitumor activities, as well as flavonoids and phenolic acids, which may contribute to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. In traditional medicine, Philotria minor is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and may also be used in the form of a tincture or powder for various health applications.
